mapper.sql: s.id AS station_id, s.name AS station_name, c.region, s.status, s.data_quality, s.sort_index, sc.biz_date, sc.time_slot, sc.load_kw, sc.pv_output_kw, sc.forecast_day_ahead_kw, sc.forecast_ultra_short_kw
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sa_station_curve_15m sc JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = sc.station_id JOIN sa_company c ON c.id = s.company_id WHERE sc.biz_date = #{bizDate} ORDER BY s.sort_index, sc.time_slot
